ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: SQLSeal will refresh your tables when underlying data changes.
ast.target: 当底层数据发生变化时，SQLSeal 将刷新您的表格。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Syntax will get highlighted when editing SQLSeal code
ast.target: 编辑 SQLSeal 代码时，语法将获得高亮显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default SQLSeal automatically rewrites `tag = '#a' AND tag = '#b'` into an efficient INTERSECT query. Enable this to turn off that behaviour and write raw SQL yourself.
ast.target: 默认情况下，SQLSeal 会自动将 `tag = '#a' AND tag = '#b'` 重写为高效的 INTERSECT 查询。启用此选项可关闭该行为并自行编写原始 SQL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This view will be used by default when you don't provide any view definition in your query
ast.target: 当您未在查询中提供任何视图定义时，将默认使用此视图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many items should display for each page of the Grid view
ast.target: 网格视图每页应显示多少个项目。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the new name for this column

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables CSV files in your vault and adds ability to display them in a grid.
ast.target: 启用您库中的 CSV 文件，并添加在网格中显示它们的能力。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables Editing functions in the CSV Viewer. This will add buttons to add columns, remove individual rows and columns; and edit each entry.
ast.target: 在 CSV 查看器中启用编辑功能。这将添加用于添加列、删除单个行和列以及编辑每个条目的按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables JSON and JSON5 files in your files explorer and allows to preview them.
ast.target: 在您的文件资源管理器中启用 JSON 和 JSON5 文件，并允许预览它们。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables JSONL and NDJSON files in your files explorer and allows previewing them as a table.
ast.target: 在您的文件资源管理器中启用 JSONL 和 NDJSON 文件，并允许将它们作为表格进行预览。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables SQL, SQLSeal, SQLite and DB files in your vault to preview then and execture queries.
ast.target: 启用您库中的 SQL、SQLSeal、SQLite 和 DB 文件以进行预览和执行查询。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用 SQL 资源管理器

ast.target: flowchart-elk 在 Mermaid v11 中已移至外部包。请参阅[发布说明](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/v11.0.0)了解更多详情。此图表将使用 `dagre` 布局作为后备方案进行渲染。

ast.target: 您设置了自定义滚轮灵敏度。这将使您的应用在使用主流鼠标时缩放不自然。仅当您能保证所有用户都将使用与您当前机器相同的硬件和操作系统配置时，才应更改此默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render math in display mode, which puts the math in display style (so \int and \sum are large, for example), and centers the math on the page on its own line.
ast.target: 以显示模式渲染数学公式，这将使数学公式采用显示样式（例如，\\int 和 \\sum 会变大），并将数学公式居中显示在页面上单独的一行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the markup language of the output.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render display math in leqno style (left-justified tags).
ast.target: 以 leqno 样式（左对齐标签）渲染显示数学公式。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 将显示数学公式左对齐渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a minimum thickness, in ems, for fraction lines, `\sqrt` top lines, `{array}` vertical lines, `\hline`, `\hdashline`, `\underline`, `\overline`, and the borders of `\fbox`, `\boxed`, and `\fcolorbox`.
ast.target: 指定分数线、`\\sqrt` 顶线、`{array}` 垂直线、`\\hline`、`\\hdashline`、`\\underline`、`\\overline` 以及 `\\fbox`、`\\boxed` 和 `\\fcolorbox` 边框的最小厚度（以 em 为单位）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes \color behave like LaTeX's 2-argument \textcolor, instead of LaTeX's one-argument \color mode change.
ast.target: 使 \\color 的行为类似于 LaTeX 的双参数 \\textcolor，而不是 LaTeX 的单参数 \\color 模式更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turn on strict / LaTeX faithfulness mode, which throws an error if the input uses features that are not supported by LaTeX.
ast.target: 开启严格 / LaTeX 忠实模式，如果输入使用了 LaTeX 不支持的功能，将抛出错误。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trust the input, enabling all HTML features such as \url.
ast.target: 信任输入，启用所有 HTML 功能，例如 \\url。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If non-zero, all user-specified sizes, e.g. in \rule{500em}{500em}, will be capped to maxSize ems. Otherwise, elements and spaces can be arbitrarily large
ast.target: 如果非零，所有用户指定的大小（例如在 \\rule{500em}{500em} 中）都将被限制为 maxSize ems。否则，元素和空间可以任意大。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit the number of macro expansions to the specified number, to prevent e.g. infinite macro loops. If set to Infinity, the macro expander will try to fully expand as in LaTeX.
ast.target: 将宏展开次数限制为指定次数，以防止例如无限宏循环。如果设置为 Infinity，宏展开器将尝试像 LaTeX 一样完全展开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fork or join in process flow

ast.name: description
ast.source: Markdown-ish syntax for generating flowcharts, mindmaps, sequence diagrams, class diagrams, gantt charts, git graphs and more.
ast.target: 用于生成流程图、思维导图、序列图、类图、甘特图、Git 图等的类 Markdown 语法。

ast.target: 此对象表示解析器处于记录阶段

ast.name: description

ast.target: 一个属于 Lt、Lm 或 Lo 的 Unicode 字符

ast.source: Trailing quote on quoted field is malformed
ast.target: 引号字段末尾的引号格式错误

ast.name: message
ast.source:
Warning: No LINE_BREAKS Found.
	This Lexer has been defined to track line and column information,
	But none of the Token Types can be identified as matching a line terminator.
	See https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/resolving_lexer_errors.html#LINE_BREAKS 
	for details.
ast.target:
警告：未找到 LINE_BREAKS。
	此词法分析器被定义为跟踪行和列信息，
	但没有任何令牌类型可被识别为匹配行终止符。
	请参阅 https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/resolving_lexer_errors.html#LINE_BREAKS 
	了解详情。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 已将分支 feature 合并到 main

ast.name: message
ast.target: 已将 [object Object] 拣选到 release

ast.name: message
ast.source: The grid always uses the browser's ResizeObserver, this grid option has no effect.
ast.target: 网格始终使用浏览器的 ResizeObserver，此网格选项无效。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Either use `onDisplayedColumnsChanged` which is fired at the same time, or use one of the more specific column events.
ast.target: 请改用同时触发的 `onDisplayedColumnsChanged`，或使用更具体的列事件。

ast.name: message
ast.source: `gridOptions` and `columnDefs` both have a `context` property that should be used for arbitrary user data. This means that column definitions and gridOptions should only contain valid properties making this property redundant.
ast.target: `gridOptions` 和 `columnDefs` 都有一个 `context` 属性，可用于存储任意用户数据。这意味着列定义和 gridOptions 应仅包含有效属性，从而使此属性变得多余。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Advanced filter no longer uses function evaluation, so this option has no effect.
ast.target: 高级过滤器不再使用函数求值，因此此选项无效。

ast.name: message
ast.source: `showLoadingOverlay` is deprecated. Use the grid option "loading"=true instead or setGridOption("loading", true).
ast.target: `showLoadingOverlay` 已弃用。请改用网格选项 \"loading\"=true 或 setGridOption(\"loading\", true)。

ast.name: name
ast.source:
This CSTNode indicates the Parser is in Recording Phase
	See: https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/internals.html#grammar-recording for details
ast.target: 此CSTNode表示解析器处于录制阶段\n\t详情请参阅：https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/internals.html#grammar-recording
